summary: Phase 4 System Management features fully tested and working. All new APIs (/api/system/info, /api/system/logs, /api/system/logs/bundle) return correct data. /admin/system page renders with 4 overview cards (Version, Uptime, Festplatte, Modus) and 4 tabs (Backups, Updates, Logs, Details). All existing APIs still work. UI is German-localized correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/system/info returns version (1.0.0), uptime, disk info, mode (MASTER), hostname
GET /api/system/logs returns recent log lines array
/admin/system page renders with 4 overview cards (Version v1.0.0, Uptime, Festplatte 32.2%, Modus MASTER)
/admin/system Backups tab: shows 21 backups with download/restore/delete buttons
/admin/system Updates tab: current version v1.0.0, available versions list (v1.0.0 stable, v1.0.1 latest)
/admin/system Logs tab: log viewer with colored output (red for ERROR, amber for WARNING), Bundle download button
/admin/system Details tab: Hostname, Betriebssystem (Linux), Python (3.11.14), disk info
/admin/system is accessible from sidebar navigation (System nav item visible)
GET /api/backups returns backup list with stats
/setup wizard page loads with German UI (ERSTEINRICHTUNG)
/kiosk page loads with locked board display and pricing (German: GESPERRT, PREISE)
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: Logs tab shows some ERROR logs about timezone comparison in scheduler - these are existing issues not related to Phase 4
System service correctly handles missing log files gracefully
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing default admin/staff users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 System Management is fully implemented and tested. The /admin/system page has 4 tabs (Backups, Updates, Logs, Details) with all functionality working. Backend uses SQLite (not MongoDB). The system service provides system info, log access, and log bundle downloads. German localization is correct throughout the app.
